title: Tubella semilunata
taxonomy: Tubella semilunata is a species of jellyfish in the phylum Cnidaria. It belongs to the class Cubozoa and the order Carybdeida. The family to which it belongs is Carybdeidae. Tubella semilunata is considered a type of box jellyfish, known for its distinctive box-like shape. Its classification is further supported by its unique characteristics and physical traits.
